exercises.title: Simple If Statement
exercises.description: Check if age >= 18, print 'You are an adult' if true
exercises.expected_answer:
if age >= 18:
    print('You are an adult')
exercises.solution:
if age >= 18:
    print('You are an adult')
exercises.explanation: Use if statement with proper indentation for the code block.

exercises.title: If-Else Statement
exercises.explanation: else runs when the if condition is False.

exercises.title: For Loop
exercises.description: Print numbers 1 to 5 using a loop

exercises.title: While Loop
exercises.description: Print numbers starting from 5 counting down to 1
